headline: Quanta Stock Up 38% in 6 Months: Should Investors Still Buy PWR Now?
summary: PWR stock gains 38% in the past six months on strong earnings and record backlog tied to grid upgrades and AI-driven power demand. Can the rally keep going?

headline: 5 Stock Picks Last Week From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: US stocks settle lower on Friday, Dow falls over 450 points. Stocks saw losses last week, with S&P 500 down 2% and Dow down 3%. Nasdaq declined 1.2%. Benzinga's Analyst Ratings API provides high-quality stock ratings from major banks. Top analyst picks from the 5 most accurate analysts include Ciena, AAR Corp, Emcor Group, and Nlight Inc.
